packageRules.description: Pre-1.0 Rust crates: minor bumps are de-facto breaking under cargo's semver. The default 'all-non-major' batch hides several breaking changes in one untestable PR — split each into its own PR so it can be vetted and landed independently. Stable-version (>= 1.0) patches stay batched as the noise/risk tradeoff favors batching there.
